economic_notes: Halalt First Nation holds investments in Hul'q'umi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership, Halalt Logging and Contracting Limited Partnership, and Halaltd Corporate Holdings Ltd. Business enterprises include 1241478 BC LTD, Halalt Corporate Holdings LTD, VIG Projects BC GP LTD, Halalt Shellfish Development Corporation (100% interest), and Halalt Logging Contracting Limited Partnership, VIG Projects BC Limited Partnership (99.9% interest). Also holds interest in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to unavailability of audited financial statements for three investment entities: Hul'q'umi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership, Halalt Logging and Contracting Limited Partnership, and Halaltd Corporate Holdings Ltd. The consolidated statements include 3 consolidated entities (Government Administration, Ottawa Trust Funds, CMHC Housing Program Fund) and 6 GBEs/partnerships accounted for by modified equity method. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $30,000 to $5,343,447, likely related to CMHC housing funding received. Long-term investments of $2,067,531 made during year (cash flow). Restricted cash of $180,516 includes CMHC Replacement Reserve ($138,565) and CMHC Operating Reserve ($41,951). Prior year cash balance per note 3 shows $3,349,639 vs $3,349,638 on balance sheet - minor rounding difference.
